title: The Phone of Undying
description: replaces the totem of undying with a phone
body:
replaces the totem of undying with a phone :D
I made the offhand model of the phone slightly smaller so it does not entirely obstruct the player's view. This datapack works in version 1.21.9 and 1.21.10![phone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afb12df61583077eaa310e0c5a57137e0cb7fcfb.png)

**To use this resource pack, simply put the file in your resource pack folder.**
